The new plan creates the Federal Department of Investigations (DFI).","score":0.6122407,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.argentina.gob.ar/noticias/el-presidente-milei-presento-el-nuevo-departamento-federal-de-investigaciones-dfi-corazon","title":"El Presidente Milei presentó el nuevo Departamento ...","content":"El Presidente Milei presentó el nuevo Departamento Federal de Investigaciones (DFI), corazón de la nueva Policía Federal ... 17 de junio de 2025.","score":0.5037359,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Argentine_Federal_Police","title":"Argentine Federal Police","content":"The Argentine Federal Police is the national civil police force of the Argentine federal government. The PFA has detachments throughout the country.","score":0.40825373,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.batimes.com.ar/news/argentina/milei-announces-overhaul-of-federal-polices-powers.phtml","title":"Milei announces overhaul of Federal Police’s powers | Buenos Aires Times","content":"President Javier Milei announces changes to the Federal Police force. President Javier Milei has expanded the powers of Argentina’s Federal Police force by decree, introducing new rules that allow officers to carry out arrests, searches, digital surveillance and use service weapons without a court order. In a decree approved Tuesday, Milei authorised new statutes that change the operational role of the force, which will now focus on federal complex crimes such as organised crime, drug-trafficking and cybercrime. Officials portrayed the changes as a part of an “integral programme of modernisation” that will see Argentina’s Federal Police learn from overseas policing forces like the FBI in the United States. Under the new measures, Argentina’s Federal Police may detain individuals for up to 10 hours without a warrant in order to verify their identity when there is a presumption of criminal activity. The decree lays out a plan for the “modernisation of the Argentine Federal Police” under the orbit of the National Security Ministry, which will be partially financed by the progressive reduction in the entry of new non-commissioned officers.","score":0.39564833,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://insightcrime.org/news/argentina-police-reform-sparks-concern-over-strategy","title":"Argentina Police Reform Sparks Concern Over Strategy","content":"The Argentine government has reformed the Federal Police's organic law to steer the institution toward preventing and investigating complex crimes.","score":0.24113671,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":2.01,"request_id":"996356b7-349c-47ff-b6cd-80e188f5ce4c"}
